archive_data.question_text: नागरहोल राष्ट्रीय उद्यान ______ में स्थित है।

explanation.english: Nagarhole National Park is located in the state of Karnataka. It is also known as Rajiv Gandhi National Park and is part of the Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve.
explanation.tanglish: Nagarhole Rashtriya Udhyaan Karnataka maanilathil ullathu. Idhu Rajiv Gandhi Rashtriya Udhyaan endrum sollappadum, idhu Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve oda ingam.

archive_data.question_text: 1820 में, थॉमस मुनरो ने निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी लगान व्यवस्था आरंभ की थी?

explanation.english: In 1820, Thomas Munro introduced the Ryotwari system in the Madras Presidency. Under this system, the British made revenue settlement directly with the cultivators (ryots) instead of zamindars.
explanation.tanglish: 1820 aandil Thomas Munro Madras Presidency la Ryotwari lagan muraiyai aarambithaar. Ithil British kaarar velanadra munnorudan (ryots) neraga varumanam seithu koluva maarrai seithargal.

archive_data.question_text: गांधार कला शैली ______ कला से प्रभावित थी।

explanation.english: Gandhara art style was influenced by Greco-Roman (Greek and Roman) art. It emerged in the ancient Gandhara region (present-day Pakistan and Afghanistan) and shows strong Hellenistic influences.
explanation.tanglish: Gandhara kalai Yunaani matrum Roman kalaiyaal prabhavitthamaanathu. Idhu praachina Gandhara nattiyil (imaiyana Pakistan matrum Afghanistan) thotram petrathu, Hellenistic parimaanangal ainththu kaattugirathu.
